rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JOAN FARMER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel San Jose Water Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, October 19, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel San Jose Water Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents and request for sanctions is continued to November 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 at the request of the moving parties. = (220/HEK)
